info.title: walkerOS Tag Manager API
info.description: API for managing walkerOS flows, projects, and real-time event observation.

tags.name: Settings
tags.description: Per-settings management (named flows within a Config)

tags.name: Service Accounts
tags.description: Project service accounts and their tokens

text.example: The MCP flow_bundle tool is great but slow on large configs.

appVersion.description: Build identity of the running app (git short hash injected at build time).

contractVersion.description: Semver of the API contract the server implements.

contractHash.description: Deterministic sha256 of the OpenAPI contract content.

post.description: Send a magic link to the provided email address for passwordless authentication. Always returns success to prevent email enumeration.

200.description: Magic link sent (or would be sent if email exists)

post.description: Redeem a magic link token and create an authenticated session. Redeems immediately when the browser-nonce cookie from the magic-link request matches; otherwise answers confirm_required and expects a follow-up call with confirm: true.

200.description: Redemption result. status=ok sets the session cookie and carries the redirect target.

get.description: Side-effect-free redirector to the /auth/verify page for links minted before the page-URL change. Never consumes the token; redemption happens via POST.

307.description: Redirect to the /auth/verify page with the token forwarded

post.description: Destroy the current session and clear the session cookie.

get.description: Return the identity of the authenticated user. Supports session cookie and Bearer token.

delete.description: Soft-delete the authenticated account, starting the 30-day grace window. Requires a confirmation of the account email in the body. Revokes all sessions, API tokens, and MCP tokens. Blocked with 409 when the caller is the sole owner of a project that still has other members.

409.description: Sole owner of a shared project

get.description: Download a portable JSON export of everything the platform holds about the authenticated account: profile, memberships, token and session metadata, MCP sessions with messages, feedback, and invitations. Metadata only; token hashes and secret values are never included. Served as a file attachment.
List all active sessions for the authenticated user. The current session is marked with isCurrent: true.

delete.description: Revoke a session by ID. Cannot revoke the current session (use logout instead).

post.description: Generate a device code and user code for the device authorization flow.
Approve a device authorization request using the user code. Requires authentication.
Poll for authorization status using the device code. Returns a token when approved.

get.description: List all projects where the authenticated user is a member.

post.description: Create a new project. The authenticated user becomes the owner.

get.description: Get a single project by ID. Requires membership.

patch.description: Update project details. Requires owner role.

delete.description: Delete a project and all its resources. Requires owner role.

get.description: List all members of a project. Requires membership.

post.description: Add a member to the project by email. Requires owner role.

patch.description: Update a member's role. Requires owner role.

delete.description: Remove a member from the project. Requires owner role.

get.description: List all flows for a project.

post.description: Create a new flow in the project. Requires member role.

get.description: Get a single flow by ID. Use ?fields to select specific sections (reduces response size).

schema.description: Comma-separated dot-paths to select specific fields (e.g., "config.variables,config.flows.tracking.sources"). Always includes id, createdAt, updatedAt.

parameters.description: Comma-separated dot-paths to select specific fields (e.g., "config.variables,config.flows.tracking.sources"). Always includes id, createdAt, updatedAt.
parameters.name: fields

patch.description: Update an existing flow. Creates a version snapshot before applying changes. Requires member role. Use Content-Type: application/merge-patch+json to send only changed fields (RFC 7386).

schema.description: ETag from a previous GET. Returns 412 if flow was modified since.

parameters.description: ETag from a previous GET. Returns 412 if flow was modified since.
parameters.name: if-match

412.description: ETag mismatch — flow was modified since last read

delete.description: Soft delete a flow (sets deleted_at timestamp). Requires member role.

schema.description: ETag from a previous GET. Returns 412 if flow was modified since.

parameters.description: ETag from a previous GET. Returns 412 if flow was modified since.
parameters.name: if-match

412.description: ETag mismatch — flow was modified since last read

post.description: Create a copy of an existing flow with a new ID and no version history. Requires member role.

get.description: List a flow's secrets as metadata only (name, id, timestamps). Values are never returned. Requires member role and the secrets entitlement.

post.description: Create a secret for a flow. The value is encrypted at rest and never returned. Requires member role and the secrets entitlement.

put.description: Rotate a secret's value (re-encrypts). The value is never returned. Requires member role and the secrets entitlement.

delete.description: Soft-delete a secret. Idempotent: deleting a missing secret returns 204. Requires member role and the secrets entitlement.

get.description: Return decrypted secret values for a flow as a name-to-value map. Dual auth: a runtime container Bearer token bound to (projectId, flowId) with the `runner:read-secrets` scope returns only the bundle-referenced subset; a session cookie with member role returns all of the flow's secrets for administration. Responses are never cached.

200.description: Decrypted secret values keyed by name

post.description: Add a named example to a step. Examples are stored as an object map keyed by name. Rejects duplicate names with 409.

put.description: Edit an existing named example in place, merging provided fields onto the stored entry. Returns 404 when the named example does not exist.

delete.description: Remove a named example from a step. Returns 404 when the named example does not exist.

schema.description: Name of the example to remove.

parameters.description: Name of the example to remove.
parameters.name: name

post.summary: Save an observed hop as a step example
post.description: Persist an observed journey hop as a named example on a step of the DRAFT flow config. Gated by the 'observe' feature. The step path and scenario come from the body; `example.in` is stored verbatim (post-redaction). Rejects a duplicate scenario name with 409.

get.description: Get the latest deployment for a flow.

post.description: Start a new deployment for a flow. The bundle runs asynchronously on the worker. Returns 400 AMBIGUOUS_CONFIG when the flow has multiple named settings (use the per-settings deploy endpoint instead). When an Idempotency-Key replays a prior request, returns 200 with status `already_created`.

200.description: Deployment started, or idempotent replay of a prior request

429.description: Rate limited or concurrent deploy limit (Retry-After header)

get.description: Get a specific deployment by ID.

delete.description: Delete a deployment and its container. Requires owner role.

get.description: List active named settings for a flow.
Get a single settings entry with its latest deployment.
Download the named flow settings as a self-contained Config JSON file. Includes parent variables and definitions.
Download the compiled JS/MJS for the settings' latest deployment. Redirects to a presigned download URL.

post.description: Start a deployment for a specific settings entry. Detects platform from the settings.

get.description: Get the latest deployment for a specific settings entry.
Get a specific deployment by ID, scoped to a settings entry.

post.description: Create a new preview for a web flow settings entry. Bundles the flow and publishes to a unique token-based URL.

get.description: List all previews for a flow, ordered by creation date descending.
Get a single preview by ID.

delete.description: Delete a preview and its S3 bundle. Requires member role.

post.description: Mint a fresh, origin-bound activation grant for an existing preview. Grants are origin-bound, so a preview needs one grant per host origin — re-mint whenever the target origin changes.

409.description: No active web deployment / host bundle not preview-enabled

post.description: Start an Observe session for a flow. Validates the flow topology, inserts the row, and kicks off detached provisioning. Returns the row immediately as arming.

get.description: Get an observe session: status, error message, config snapshot, web activation info, and the live server endpoint when live.

delete.description: End an observe session: tear down the container, revoke credentials, delete the web preview, delete the row. Idempotent.

get.description: Assemble the session's cross-runtime journeys server-side: fetch the raw records from the observer, derive the pipeline topology from the config snapshot, and run the pure assembler. Returns the journeys and per-platform loss gaps wrapped with the session scope.

Resolve the flow's single active Observe session and assemble its cross-runtime journeys server-side. `observe_sessions.flow_id` is UNIQUE, so a flow has at most one session; when none is active the response carries `sessionId: null` with empty journeys rather than a 404. Narrow with `traceId` (one trace) and `limit` (page cap, most recent kept). This is the MCP `observe_journeys` REST contract.

post.description: Keep an observe session warm. The window posts this every 30s while open; a stale session is reaped by the janitor.
The navigator.sendBeacon end target for page unload. Mirrors the DELETE end route because sendBeacon cannot send a DELETE. Idempotent.

get.description: List all versions for a flow.
Get a specific version of a flow.

post.description: Restore a flow to a specific version. Creates a new version snapshot. Requires member role.

get.description: List all API tokens for the authenticated user. Returns summaries (no raw token values).

post.description: Create a new API token. The raw token is returned once and cannot be retrieved again.

delete.description: Revoke an API token (soft delete via revokedAt timestamp).

post.description: Bundle a flow using CLI. Returns bundleId (content-hash). Use ?output=download to redirect to presigned S3 URL.

schema.description: Named flow to bundle (required for multi-settings flows)

parameters.description: Named flow to bundle (required for multi-settings flows)
parameters.name: flow

schema.description: Set to "download" to redirect to the bundle file

parameters.description: Set to "download" to redirect to the bundle file
parameters.name: output

302.description: Redirect to presigned bundle URL (when output=download)

post.description: Execute a simulation against a pre-built bundle. Requires bundleId from the bundle endpoint.

get.description: List deployments for a project. Supports filtering by status, type, origin, and flowId, plus pagination.

post.description: Create a new deployment slot. Supports an Idempotency-Key header — a repeated key returns the original deployment id with status `already_created`. Requires member role.

schema.description: Optional client key to make creation idempotent.

parameters.description: Optional client key to make creation idempotent.
parameters.name: idempotency-key

get.description: List the latest deployment for each flow in the project.

post.description: Register a server-side runtime container and get a presigned bundle URL.

Generate a one-time ticket for authenticating an SSE connection to the Observer service. Requires project membership. An optional scope narrows the ticket to a subset of the project feed (e.g. one Observe session).
Internal endpoint for the Observer service to validate and consume a ticket.

get.description: Check the health of the API and its dependencies.
Return the OpenAPI 3.1 specification for this API.

post.description: Ingest walkerOS events for a project. Served by the Observer service (port 3001).

get.description: Server-Sent Events stream for real-time event observation. Requires a valid ticket. Served by the Observer service (port 3001).
Health check for the Observer service (port 3001).

post.description: Accepts free-form feedback from the walkerOS CLI, MCP, or a future in-app form. Public endpoint — no authentication required. The body `userId` is stored verbatim as a best-effort contact email and is not validated against the app users table.

get.description: List service accounts for a project. Requires member role.

post.description: Create a service account and its first token. The raw token is returned once and cannot be retrieved again. Requires admin role.

201.description: Service account created (raw token shown once)

get.description: Get a single service account by ID. Requires member role.

patch.description: Update a service account's name, description, or role. Requires admin role.

delete.description: Soft-delete a service account and revoke all its tokens. Requires admin role.

get.description: List tokens for a service account. Returns summaries (no raw token values). Requires member role.

post.description: Create a new token for a service account. The raw token is returned once and cannot be retrieved again. Requires admin role.

delete.description: Revoke a service account token. Requires admin role.

get.description: List invitations for a project. Defaults to pending; pass ?status=all for every status. Requires admin role.

post.description: Create an invitation and send the invite email. Requires admin role.

delete.description: Cancel a pending invitation. Requires admin role.

get.description: Preview invitation details. No authentication required — the token is the credential.

post.description: Accept an invitation. Requires authentication; the authenticated user's email must match the invitation email.
Decline an invitation. No authentication required — the token is the credential.
Accept a single walkerOS v4 event from the CLI or MCP telemetry emitter. Public endpoint — no authentication. `source.type` is constrained to `cli` or `mcp`.

get.description: Get billing details for a project, or null when none are set. Requires member role.

put.description: Create or update billing details for a project. Requires owner role.

get.description: Get deployment detail. Accepts a dep_ID or a slug. Requires member role.

patch.description: Update a deployment's label, or stop/resume it. Stop and resume require admin role; label updates require member role.

delete.description: Tear down and soft-delete a deployment. Idempotent. Requires owner role.

post.description: Push a new version to a deployment, either from an existing flow setting or from a direct config upload. Bundles in-process and transitions the deployment to `deploying`. Requires member role.

schema.description: Optional client key to make publishing idempotent.

parameters.description: Optional client key to make publishing idempotent.
parameters.name: idempotency-key

429.description: Rate limited or concurrent deploy limit

get.description: Server-Sent Events (`text/event-stream`) stream of a deployment's live status. Emits named events: `status` (a snapshot payload, schema below), `done` (terminal, no body), and `timeout`. The CLI consumes this with a raw fetch while waiting for a deploy to finish. Requires member role. The schema documents the JSON `data:` of a `status` event; `errorCode`/`errorMessage` carry the persisted, redacted classification of a failed deploy.

200.description: SSE stream; `status` event payload shape documented here.

get.description: List the version history for a deployment, paginated. Requires member role.

List the release history for a flow across all of its deployment lineages, newest first, paginated. Each entry is a deployed version joined to its parent deployment (slug and type). Requires member role.

Get the active deployed per-setting content for a deployment, used to diff changes since deploy. Content is masked and display-only; every field is null when there is no deployed baseline. Requires member role.
List heartbeat records for a deployment with optional from/to time-range filtering and pagination. Requires member role.

schema.description: ISO start of the time range.

parameters.description: ISO start of the time range.
parameters.name: from

schema.description: ISO end of the time range.

parameters.description: ISO end of the time range.
parameters.name: to

post.description: Rotate the ingest token for a deployment. Owner-only. No grace window: the previous token is immediately invalidated and the new token is returned once.

get.description: Aggregate usage summary plus bucketed chart data for a deployment over the requested period. Requires member role.

schema.description: Time window for the usage summary.

parameters.description: Time window for the usage summary.
parameters.name: period

get.description: List custom domains attached to any deployment of this flow. Requires member role and the customDomains feature.

post.description: Attach a custom domain to the flow's latest server deployment, or to an explicit deployment supplied in the body. Requires member role and the customDomains feature.

delete.description: Detach a custom domain from its deployment and remove the Scaleway record. Idempotent: a missing domain still returns 204.

get.description: Report whether a self-hosted deploy token exists for this config, plus the deployment health summary when present. Requires member role.

post.description: Create a self-hosted deployment (if none exists) and mint a flow+deployment-bound runner token. Admin-only. The raw token is returned once and never stored in plaintext.

get.description: Return resolved feature entitlements for the authenticated user and project. Used by CLI/API clients; the web UI uses SSR-resolved entitlements. Requires viewer role.
Report which LLM provider is currently active for the project and where billing is sourced. Never returns the apiKey. Requires member role and the chat feature.

post.description: Set or clear the project LLM provider override. Admin-only, gated by the chat feature. The apiKey is write-only: it is encrypted and never returned.

get.description: List the caller's recent chat sessions for a project, ordered by last activity. Requires member role and the chat feature.
Return a chat session and its full message history when the caller owns it. Foreign or unknown sessions return 404 (never 403) so existence is not leaked. Requires member role and the chat feature.

post.description: Answer a pending MCP elicitation prompt (accept, decline, or cancel), unblocking the waiting tool invocation. Requires member role and the chat feature.

get.description: List the authenticated user's personal MCP tokens. No secret material is returned.

post.description: Issue a personal MCP token. The raw token is returned exactly once and is never retrievable afterwards.

delete.description: Revoke a personal MCP token by id.

get.description: Deprecated: runners migrated to deployments (origin=self-hosted). Always returns an empty list for backward compatibility. Requires member role.

post.description: Accept a self-hosted runner heartbeat with usage counters. Authenticated by a flow+deployment-bound runner token. Updates deployment liveness and records an immutable usage row.

get.description: Resolved `@walkeros/*` package catalog for the add-step picker, optionally filtered by type and platform.
Returns the full @walkeros/* package catalog; clients filter locally.

post.description: Records one settled search outcome (the term the user paused on and whether the catalog matched it). Fire-and-forget; returns 204.
Fire-and-forget beacon for client-side connect timing SLIs. No auth required; carries no secrets. Returns 204.
